name: mailbridge-mcp
description: Safely search, read, draft, and explicitly send mail through accounts configured in macOS Mail.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex safely to macOS Mail.
interface.longDescription: A local-only bridge to accounts already configured in macOS Mail, with bounded reads, explicit partial-search reporting, draft workflows, and per-send confirmation for outbound mail.
defaultPrompt: Read my latest three Inbox messages across configured accounts.
Find a message, then summarize it safely.
Draft an exact reply, show it, and send only after I explicitly approve that content.
